1.title: Mobile App Developer (Agentic Coding Contractor)
1.Description:
● Developed a cross-platform Android and iOS application using Cursor as an AI-assisted coding environment, building a real-time computer-vision tool that automatically counts consecutive kicks of a sipa (a traditional Filipino game) before it hits the ground.
● Integrated a Google image-processing model for player detection alongside an in-house ONNX model for object detection, combining both into a single real-time on-device inference pipeline.
● Owned implementation of all detection models plus the app's full screen navigation and mobile architecture, as the sole developer on the project.

2.title: Senior Developer
2.Description:
● Developed and tested a new AI-assisted insurance platform using Next.js, TypeScript, Express, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Blob Storage, Zod, JWT/JWKS, and the OpenAI SDK, built with Claude Code as the primary AI-assisted development tool.
● Drive end-to-end development, support, and release execution across two core insurance systems: a legacy enterprise application built on .NET Framework and a modern cloud-native ecosystem utilizing a 5-microservice .NET Core backend and React frontend.
● Established developer guidelines via 'claude.md' and led the migration of legacy codebase repositories from SVN to GitHub, integrating agentic AI coding tools into the team's daily workflow.
● Authored automated test coverage with Jest and Testing Library plus Playwright end-to-end tests (via MCP integration with Claude Code), alongside manual testing across dev, UAT, and production environments.
● Manage cloud infrastructure configurations on AWS, including orchestrating AWS API Gateways and configuring secure configurations using AWS Parameter Store.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.Description:
● Engineered a secure RESTful API for background check integrations, handling sensitive data for global enterprise clients.
● Optimized a global contingent workforce system by contributing to the Vue 3 migration, resulting in a 25% increase in frontend rendering performance.
● Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver scalable solutions across a complex Oracle and SQL Server database landscape.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Developed bug fixes and feature enhancements using HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), and C#, maintaining high code quality and system stability.
● Maintained and troubleshot a supply chain management system, diagnosing and resolving client-reported defects across front-end and back-end layers to ensure business continuity.

0.Title: Higher Education Digital Transformation Ecosystem
0.Description: Directed the end-to-end digital overhaul for Colegio De Laurel, designing three interconnected systems (Admission, Enrollment, and Public Portal). Migrated the institution from manual, paper-based processes to a secure, cloud-native infrastructure on AWS with automated CI/CD pipelines.
